---
title: "Procrastination as a risk factor for poor health in older adults"
date: 2024-09-06
author:
  - name: Cormac Monaghan
    url: https://c-monaghan.github.io/
    orcid: 0000-0001-9012-3060
    affiliation:
      - Hamilton Institute, Maynooth University, Ireland
      - Department of Psychology, Maynooth University, Ireland
  - name: Rafael de Andrade Moral
    url: https://rafamoral.github.io/
    orcid: 0000-0002-0875-3563
    affiliation:
      - Department of Mathematics and Statistics, Maynooth University, Ireland
  - name: Joanna McHugh Power
    orcid: 0000-0002-7387-3107
    affiliation:
      - Department of Psychology, Maynooth University, Ireland
categories:
  - procrastination
  - health
  - generalised additive models
  - conference
pub-info:
  reference: >-
   <strong>Monaghan, C</strong>, <a href="https://rafamoral.github.io/">de Andrade Moral, R</a>, & <a href="https://www.maynoothuniversity.ie/people/joanna-mchugh-power">McHugh Power, J</a>. (2024). <em>Procrastination as a risk factor for poor health in older adults</em> [Poster Session]. 38th Annual Conference of the European Health Psychology Society. Cascais, Portugal.
  links:
    - name: Poster
      url: ./files/EHPS_2024.pdf
      local: true
      icon: fa-solid fa-file-image
---

## Important links

-   [Conference poster](./files/EHPS_2024.pdf){target="_blank"}
-   [Book of abstracts](https://2024.ehps.net/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/ehps-2024_abstracts-Page-numbers.pdf){target="_blank"}
